textByHash.d65d52406523fec56f31833cc2a8f0ad996a1a75: You do not have an appointment.
textByHash.33f5e49674032a497f09ee3bce215284ea6aafc7: An appointment to see the Queen.
textByHash.5d4d897adbc028ef7c4c0b5783fcf7c3ea23fd30: First, because it is my job. Second, because she is not in Fortis at the moment.
textByHash.530404bf0565c5978e608e8e88c27e233a5b2930: She has important business elsewhere in the kingdom. Perhaps when she returns, you'll be able to see her, or perhaps you won't.
textByHash.6879a5e0ed6bbe1e1efd719201244a07d976258c: Now, if there's nothing else, please move along.
textByHash.b0d568314372c69688a565b1cfbe960ffed2fe57: If you wish to speak with the Queen, please be quick. She is very busy and does not need you taking up too much of her time.
